title: Make It Yours: Create With AI
modules: The Blank Page Just Got a Partner
synopsis: You're a creator with a deadline, a vision, and a powerful AI co-pilot — but every tool comes with a catch. This course puts you inside real creative dilemmas where you'll learn to use AI art, writing, and music tools effectively while grappling with the ownership, originality, and ethics they raise.
rationale: Teens are already using generative AI tools for creative work but lack frameworks for thinking about authorship, originality, and ethical use in their own creative practice.
learning_outcome: Students can produce an original AI-assisted creative project and write a reflective creator's statement that addresses authorship, tool choices, and the ethical decisions they made.
